file.description: The audio file to translate, in one of these formats: flac, mp3, mp4, mpeg, mpga, m4a, ogg, wav, or webm. File uploads are limited to 25 MB.

model.description: ID of the model to use. Only whisper-1 is currently available for translation.

prompt.description: An optional text to guide the model's style or continue a previous audio segment. The prompt should be in English.

response_format.description: The format of the transcript output. Defaults to json.
